title: Unrecognized Langchain Chat Node Type Error
symptom: The workflow fails to run, displaying an error about an unrecognized node type for the Langchain chat node. The workflow execution stops at the start.
not_this_if: Using a later version of n8n that recognizes the node type
root_cause: The error occurs because the node type has been renamed in a newer version of n8n. The user is still referencing the old node type, which is no longer recognized in the current setup.
fix_steps: Open the JSON of the workflow
Replace the old node type '@n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.chatResponse' with the new type '@n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.chatTrigger'
agent_instruction: Update the node type in the workflow JSON to the new naming convention.
